title: Trace elements supplementation as management tool for anaerobic digestion process
author: Tina Kegl
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Abstract   

 Waste management and energy crisis are some of the greatest issues that the world is facing today. This problem can be mitigated by anaerobic digestion (AD), where microorganisms in the absence of oxygen produce biogas from organic waste. A useful tool for AD process understanding and optimization is numerical simulation by using mechanistically inspired mathematical models ...

Abstract   

 Waste management and energy crisis are some of the greatest issues that the world is facing today. This problem can be mitigated by anaerobic digestion (AD), where microorganisms in the absence of oxygen produce biogas from organic waste. A useful tool for AD process understanding and optimization is numerical simulation by using mechanistically inspired mathematical models ...
keywords: BioModel calibration, active set optimization procedure, approximation gradient based algorithm
